## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Code Example
If applicable, provide a minimal code example that reproduces the bug:

```typescript
// Minimal reproduction
```

## Environment
- Node version: [e.g., 18.0.0]
- Platform: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 13]
- Package version: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- Component: [FloatLib / Ledger / RiskEngine]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Impact
- [ ] Precision error
- [ ] Risk enforcement broken
- [ ] Divergence detection broken
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Severity
- [ ] Critical (trading halted, capital at risk)
- [ ] High (incorrect results, workaround exists)
- [ ] Medium (minor issue, low impact)
- [ ] Low (documentation, cosmetic)
